用英语简单介绍你的专业/学校（至少 5 个英文词）。关键词可包含 student, study, school
questions.answer: I am a student. I study English at school and I like learning new words.
questions.sampleAnswer: I am a student. I study English at school and I like learning new words.

questions.prompt: 描述你理想的一天（短说）。可提到 morning, friends, happy
questions.answer: In the morning I read books. After class I meet friends. I feel happy.
questions.sampleAnswer: In the morning I read books. After class I meet friends. I feel happy.

questions.prompt: 如何约同学一起自习？说出你的邀请句。
questions.answer: Are you free this afternoon? Shall we study together in the library?
questions.sampleAnswer: Are you free this afternoon? Shall we study together in the library?

questions.prompt: 谈论天气与心情（短说）。
questions.answer: Today the weather is sunny and warm. I feel energetic.
questions.sampleAnswer: Today the weather is sunny and warm. I feel energetic.

questions.prompt: 介绍一个你喜欢的爱好。
questions.answer: My hobby is reading because it is interesting and relaxing.
questions.sampleAnswer: My hobby is reading because it is interesting and relaxing.

questions.prompt: 在图书馆应保持？
questions.sampleAnswer: Keep quiet in the library.

questions.answer: I like English because it is useful. I practice speaking every day.

questions.answer: I like English because it is useful. I practice speaking every day.

questions.answer: I like English because it is useful. I practice speaking every day.

questions.prompt: Describe a skill you want to learn. Why?
questions.answer: I want to learn public speaking because it is helpful for my future career. I will practice every week.
questions.sampleAnswer: I want to learn public speaking because it is helpful for my future career. I will practice every week.

questions.prompt: Do you prefer online learning or classroom learning? Why?
questions.answer: I prefer classroom learning because I can interact with teachers and classmates and stay focused.
questions.sampleAnswer: I prefer classroom learning because I can interact with teachers and classmates and stay focused.

questions.prompt: Talk about a memorable trip (short).
questions.answer: Last summer I went to the mountains with my family. I enjoyed the beautiful views.
questions.sampleAnswer: Last summer I went to the mountains with my family. I enjoyed the beautiful views.

questions.prompt: What makes a good friend?
questions.answer: A good friend is honest and kind. They listen to you and support you when you need help.
questions.sampleAnswer: A good friend is honest and kind. They listen to you and support you when you need help.

questions.prompt: How do you manage stress before exams?
questions.answer: I make a study plan, exercise, and sleep well. Deep breathing also helps me relax.
questions.sampleAnswer: I make a study plan, exercise, and sleep well. Deep breathing also helps me relax.

questions.prompt: Some people prefer to work in teams; others prefer to work alone. Which do you prefer and why? (independent speaking style)
questions.answer: I prefer working in teams because we can share ideas and finish complex tasks more efficiently.
questions.sampleAnswer: I prefer working in teams because we can share ideas and finish complex tasks more efficiently.

questions.prompt: Do you agree that students should have part-time jobs? Explain.
questions.answer: I agree that students can have part-time jobs if they balance study and work. It builds experience.
questions.sampleAnswer: I agree that students can have part-time jobs if they balance study and work. It builds experience.

questions.prompt: Describe a problem in your community and a possible solution.
questions.answer: Traffic congestion is a problem. The city should improve public transport so people drive less.
questions.sampleAnswer: Traffic congestion is a problem. The city should improve public transport so people drive less.

questions.prompt: Is technology making people more isolated? Give reasons.
questions.answer: Technology can isolate people if they only use social media, but it can also help them connect globally.
questions.sampleAnswer: Technology can isolate people if they only use social media, but it can also help them connect globally.

questions.prompt: IELTS-style Part 1: Do you like reading? What kind of books?
questions.answer: Yes, I like reading novels because they help me relax and improve my vocabulary.
questions.sampleAnswer: Yes, I like reading novels because they help me relax and improve my vocabulary.

questions.prompt: IELTS-style Part 2: Describe a person who inspired you. You should say who, how you know them, and why they inspired you.
questions.answer: My high school teacher inspired me. She was hardworking and kind. She taught me to never give up.
questions.sampleAnswer: My high school teacher inspired me. She was hardworking and kind. She taught me to never give up.

questions.prompt: IELTS-style Part 3: How can schools better prepare students for the workplace?
questions.answer: Schools should offer internships and teach communication skills so students are ready for real jobs.
questions.sampleAnswer: Schools should offer internships and teach communication skills so students are ready for real jobs.

questions.prompt: Part 1: What do you usually do on weekends?
questions.answer: On weekends I usually meet friends, play sports, and rest with my family.
questions.sampleAnswer: On weekends I usually meet friends, play sports, and rest with my family.

questions.prompt: Part 3: What are the advantages of learning a foreign language?
questions.answer: Learning a foreign language opens career opportunities, helps travel, and improves cultural understanding.
questions.sampleAnswer: Learning a foreign language opens career opportunities, helps travel, and improves cultural understanding.
